description_for_human: 402-native paid work engine for agents and developers. Web extraction, search, regulatory intelligence, prediction market signals, and oracle data.
description_for_model: HYDRA is a pay-per-call API on Base L2. Top tools: /v1/extract/url ($0.01) for structured web extraction, /v1/extract/search ($0.02) for web search, /v1/extract/multi ($0.05) for batch extraction. Also: /v1/util/crypto/price ($0.001), /v1/util/scrape ($0.005), /v1/regulatory/scan ($2.00). Call any paid endpoint without payment to get x402 payment instructions. MCP server at /mcp. Free endpoints: /v1/markets, /pricing, /health.
